sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42621" key="*(ermhraklh=s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἑρμηρακλῆς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έους</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n42621.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Ἑρμαθήνη.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
